data_coverage_summary: Oracle Global Trade Management APIs has public documentation that indicates global trade and customs workflows across shipments, entries, documents, parties. Amber Road is part of Oracle GTM/TMS ecosystem.
buyer_guidance: Use this API family for customs, trade, and cross-border shipment workflows rather than asset or telemetry use cases. Amber Road should be treated as a rest api surface for global trade and customs workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Oracle Global Trade Management APIs indicates Amber Road is part of Oracle GTM/TMS ecosystem. The documented surface aligns with global trade and customs workflows and covers shipments, entries, documents, parties. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates customs, trade-compliance, and cross-border shipment workflows rather than equipment telemetry.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Oracle Global Trade Management APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as global trade and customs workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Amber Road is part of Oracle GTM/TMS ecosystem
